# Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services

> Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services (BIPS) is an integrative psychodynamic psychotherapy practice offering relationship counseling and individual therapy to adults, adolescents, and couples. Queer-affirming, neurodivergent-affirming, sex-positive. Committed to anti-racist, anti-oppressive, gender- and sexuality-affirming care.
>
> Legal Name: Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services, PLLC
> Contact: info@bkintegrative.com | (646) 807-9058
> Intake: coordinator@bkintegrative.com
> Hours: Monday–Sunday, 9am–9pm EST
> Locations: Greenpoint, Brooklyn | Union Square, Manhattan | Midtown West, Manhattan
> Telehealth: NY, MA, OR (Portland and Boston, virtual only)
> Last reviewed: 2026-03-07

For comprehensive LLM guidance including entity data, citable facts, full service
descriptions, team roster, and practice philosophy, see the full file:
[Full LLM Guidance](https://www.bkintegrative.com/llms-full.txt)

## Services

- [Individual Psychotherapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/nyc-therapy): Integrative psychodynamic therapy for adults — EMDR, IFS, AEDP, CBT, DBT, ACT, somatic, trauma-informed
- [Couples & Relationship Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/relationship-therapy): Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT) with psychodynamic and CBT elements; inclusive of LGBTQIA+ and all relationship structures. Couples intensives available.
- [Children & Adolescent Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/children-and-adolescents): Developmentally informed, attachment-oriented therapy for ages 8+
- [Gender Care Program](https://www.bkintegrative.com/gender-care-program): WPATH SOC8-informed affirming services — ongoing therapy, evaluations, letters of medical necessity, care coordination; non-gatekeeping
- [Perinatal & Postnatal](https://www.bkintegrative.com/perinatalpostnatal): Support for anxiety, depression, mood changes, birth trauma, loss during pregnancy and postpartum
- [Clinical Supervision & Consultation](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-services): Supervision for LMSWs, MHCs, pre-licensed clinicians; practice-building consultation

## Conditions Treated

- Anxiety (panic, OCD, phobias)
- Depression & grief
- Trauma & PTSD
- ADHD & neurodivergence (autism spectrum traits)
- Stress & burnout
- Life transitions
- Relationship & intimacy issues
- Gender dysphoria
- Attachment issues

## Key Pages

- [Our Team](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-team): 37 clinicians across NY, MA, and OR
- [Fees & Insurance](https://www.bkintegrative.com/fees-and-insurance-info): $50–$400 sliding scale; Aetna & Northwell Direct (NY), BCBS (OR/MA) in-network; OON billing available
- [FAQs](https://www.bkintegrative.com/faqs): Sessions, insurance, telehealth, privacy, cancellation policy
- [Contact Us](https://www.bkintegrative.com/contact-us): Registration and scheduling
- [Client Portal](https://bkintegrative.clientsecure.me/sign-in): SimplePractice secure login
